title: OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY DISABILITY, AGING AND VETERAN SERVICES OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-home care. Services include housekeeping, personal care, laundry, shopping, transportation, and meal preparation and delivery. Adult day services (non-residential community-based programs, providing services for part of the day). Registered nurse services (one-time or intermittent assessment, service planning, medication monitoring, provider training, and education). Also offers case management and options counseling (counseling to support informed decision-making on services based on strengths, needs, and preferences). Service hours per person vary depending on assessed need and funding amounts. Participants may receive up to 20 hours of caregiving assistance per week. Benefits will not be subject to estate recovery. 5240 NE Elam Young Parkway Suite 300 Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Adults, age 18 and older, who meet the following criteria: -Need help from another person with personal care tasks -Income no greater than 400% of the federal poverty Level -Assets no greater than the average cost of six months in a nursing facility -Currently living in their own home and not a provider-operator or owned facility or foster/care home Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 846-3060 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 846-3060 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information; some services may have a waitlist FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near Hawthorn Farm MAX station Services: Adult
